description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a rectangular seat and backrest, both upholstered in a light beige fabric. The upholstery is segmented into a grid pattern with visible tufting, giving it a plush, cushioned appearance. The backrest is straight and of medium height, providing support without excessive bulk, and the seat is wide enough to comfortably accommodate one or two people. The legs are slim, metallic, and slightly angled, finished in a muted metallic tone that complements the upholstery. The rear of the chaise is covered in a darker material, likely for structural support and visual contrast. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, tufted beige chaise with a grid-patterned cushion, slim metallic legs, and a contrasting dark rear panel. Its clean lines and plush upholstery make it ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the tufted seat and backrest, highlighting the grid pattern and the slim legs.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the chaise's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark back panel and the metallic legs, with minimal upholstery detail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the seat, backrest, and leg structure.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium in height, and features a grid of square tufted sections, giving it a plush and structured appearance. There are no visible decorative cutouts or buttons beyond the tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and slightly angled outward, made of metal with a muted silver finish. They have a minimalist, modern look with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid beige fabric with a prominent grid pattern created by tufting, giving the surface a quilted, cushioned texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous seat cushion and a single backrest cushion, both attached and segmented into squares by the tufting. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
